docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,486.80 FILED BY JOHNSON, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT DOSS, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-29-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOSS, ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOSS, ROBERT $1,486.80 PRINCIPAL, $107.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,594.30, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. JUDGMENT IN RELATED CASE NO. 831173 IS FOR THE SAME AMOUNT. IF EITHER DEFENDANT IN EITHER CASE PAYS THE ENTIRE JUDGMENT IN THAT CASE, IT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DIANA
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
